title: AP ICET 2026 Result Highlights

detail.title: AP ICET 2026 Result Highlights
detail.short_info: AP ICET Results 2026 have been released at cets.apsche.ap.gov.in. Check the direct rank card link, qualifying marks, marks vs rank, counselling schedule and key instructions for MBA/MCA admissions.

content.text: APSCHE has declared AP ICET Results 2026 today, 16 May 2026, through the official website cets.apsche.ap.gov.in. With the result link now active, candidates can log in to the portal, view their section-wise scores, total marks and AP ICET rank, and download the official rank card for further use.

AP ICET 2026 was conducted in computer-based mode across multiple centres and sessions. The authorities have applied a normalisation process to balance difficulty levels across shifts so that candidates are scored fairly before ranks are allotted. With the publication of results, candidates can now assess their admission chances in MBA and MCA colleges across Andhra Pradesh.

rows: Andhra Pradesh Integrated Common Entrance Test (AP ICET) 2026
Andhra Pradesh State Council of Higher Education (APSCHE)
Registration number and ICET hall ticket number

sections.heading: Direct Link to AP ICET Results 2026 & Rank Card

content.text: AP ICET 2026 result and rank card have been released in online mode through the APSCHE CET portal. A dedicated “Result / Rank Card” link is now active on the AP ICET home page at cets.apsche.ap.gov.in/ICET, allowing candidates to directly access their scorecard.

The AP ICET rank card page prompts candidates to enter their registration number and ICET hall ticket number before displaying the scorecard on the screen. After verifying their personal details and marks, candidates should download the AP ICET rank card PDF and save multiple digital copies, as it will be required during counselling registration, document verification and college reporting.

sections.heading: How to Check AP ICET Results 2026 Online

content.text: Candidates who appeared for the exam can follow these steps to check their AP ICET Results 2026 and download the rank card:

items: Go to the official AP ICET website: cets.apsche.ap.gov.in/ICET.
On the home page, click on the “AP ICET 2026 Result / Rank Card” link.
Enter your AP ICET registration number and ICET hall ticket number in the login window.
Click on “Submit” or “Get Rank Card” to view your AP ICET 2026 scorecard on the screen.
Check your name, hall ticket number, category, section-wise scores, total marks and AP ICET rank carefully.
Download the AP ICET rank card as a PDF file and take one or two printouts for future use.

content.text: If the website takes time to load due to heavy traffic, candidates are advised to wait for a few minutes, refresh the page, avoid repeated back-to-back logins and access the portal using a stable internet connection.

sections.heading: Details Mentioned on AP ICET 2026 Rank Card

content.text: The AP ICET rank card 2026 carries all the key details that will be referred to during counselling and admission. After downloading the document, candidates must verify each entry.
Typically, the AP ICET 2026 rank card mentions:

items: Candidate name
Father’s name
AP ICET hall ticket number
Registration/application number
Category (OC/BC/SC/ST)
Gender and local/non-local status (if applicable)
Section-wise scores: Analytical Ability, Mathematical Ability, Communication Ability
Total score out of 200 marks
AP ICET 2026 rank
Qualifying status as per category-wise minimum marks

content.text: If any discrepancy is noticed in the personal details, category or marks, candidates should immediately contact the AP ICET helpdesk through the contact details provided on the official website and follow the instructions given by the authorities.

sections.heading: AP ICET Results 2026 - Key Instructions for Students

items: Keep your AP ICET registration number and hall ticket number safe until the entire admission process is over.
Download and store multiple copies of your AP ICET rank card in both digital and printed formats.
Verify your personal details, category, local status and marks on the rank card as soon as you download it.
In case of any mismatch or technical issue, contact the AP ICET authorities promptly through the official helpdesk.
Track the official notifications for counselling dates, fee payment and document verification so that you do not miss any deadline.
